name: Single-Mode Fiber Optic Cable (24F)
shortDescription: Outdoor armoured single-mode 24-fiber cable for long-haul backbone deployments.
description: G.652D compliant single-mode loose-tube armoured cable rated for direct burial and aerial installation. Compatible with all major splicing and termination platforms.

name: Cat6A U/UTP Cable (305m)
shortDescription: 10G-ready Cat6A U/UTP LSZH cable in 305m pull box.
description: Tier-1 Cat6A U/UTP cable certified to TIA-568.2-D, supporting 10GBASE-T to 100m. LSZH jacket for indoor backbone and horizontal runs in commercial buildings.

name: OTDR Test Set Pro
shortDescription: Field-grade OTDR with 1310/1550nm dual wavelength and 40dB dynamic range.
description: Hand-held OTDR ideal for splicing teams and acceptance testing. Generates Bellcore SR-4731 reports compatible with all major OEM analysis tools.

name: Monocrystalline Solar Panel 550W
shortDescription: High-efficiency 550W mono PERC half-cut solar panel for commercial rooftop arrays.
description: Tier-1 manufacturer 550W half-cut mono PERC module with 21.3% efficiency and 25-year linear power warranty. IEC 61215, IEC 61730 and salt-mist certified for GCC environments.

name: 42U Data Centre Server Rack
shortDescription: 42U 800x1000 mesh-door server rack with cable management and PDU mounts.
description: Heavy-gauge welded server rack designed for high-density data centre deployments. Includes adjustable mounting rails, vertical cable managers, mesh front and rear doors and tool-less side panels.

name: Enterprise IP Phone X7
shortDescription: Gigabit IP phone with HD audio, 6 SIP accounts and PoE support.
description: Productivity-grade IP phone for enterprise UC platforms. HD voice, dual gigabit ports, 6 SIP accounts and integrated Bluetooth/EHS headset support. Compatible with all major SIP platforms.
